title: Baki
sourceNotes: Netflix 2018 Baki + 2020 Great Raitai Tournament Saga — cumulative eps 1-39 (26 + 13). Both adapt the 'Baki' (a.k.a. 'New Grappler Baki') manga (276 ch). The Maximum Tournament arc (~ch 105-220) is skipped by this lineage — that arc was adapted by the 2001 anime `Grappler Baki Maximum Tournament` and is not animated here. See `baki-hanma.json` for the next manga (Hanma Baki).
